title: Simple Additions
description: This mod adds energy stuff and some additions to Minecraft!
body:
Mod Content:

Glass Door: A transparent door. Now with trapdoor variant!

Fan: An electronic machine that pushes items. You need power to run it.

Solar Panel: The only way to generate power for now. It must see the sun to generate power.

Battery: Stores power inside. You need to place solar panel to blue socket. Orange sockets are power outlets.

Mining Charge: Explodes when right clicked with hand. It drops everything at explosion range.

Amethyst Sword: Amethyst Sword works differently from other swords. It does not accept any enchantment that found in chests. It only accepts handmade enchantments. The only handmade enchantment for now is Speed Enchantment.

Speed Enchantment: Only works on Amethyst Sword. If you have a sword with this enchantment, whenever you carry this sword in your first, you will gain speed effect.

Energy Meter: Shows the amount of power that machine has.

Crusher: It destroys any items placed inside of it.

Red Rose: The rose that existed in older versions of the game.

Blue Rose: A rose variant existed in early Minecraft PE.

Emerald Apple: Gives some special potion effects when eaten.

Enchanted Emerald Apple: An advanced version of Emerald Apple. Unlike Enchanted Golden Apple, you can craft Enchanted Emerald Apple. Only OG Minecraft players may know the crafting recipe. :)

Dirt Slab: The slab that existed in early Minecraft.

Copper Nugget: Both iron and gold have their nugget variants. But there is no copper nugget in Vanilla, so I added it. You can craft it by smelting a lightning rode or using a copper ingot.

Alert Lights: Simply green, red and yellow redstone lamps.



You may want to download this mod if you like to see more stuff in Minecraft.

! This mod must be installed on both client and server side if you are using this mod on a server. 

Version: 1.2

Game Version: 1.18.2
